blur_detection.description: The text and edges show moderate blur, likely due to camera movement or slight out-of-focus capture.
blur_detection.recommendation: Retake the image ensuring the camera is stable and focused properly.

contrast_assessment.description: The contrast between text and background is adequate but could be improved for better readability.
contrast_assessment.recommendation: Ensure the document is well-lit and the camera captures it under uniform lighting conditions.

glare_identification.description: Minor glare is present in the top-right corner, slightly affecting readability.
glare_identification.recommendation: Avoid capturing the document at an angle that causes reflections or use a matte screen to reduce glare.

water_stains.description: No water stains are detected on the document.

tears_or_folds.description: No tears or folds are detected on the document.

cut_off_detection.description: A small portion of the bottom edge is slightly cut off.
cut_off_detection.recommendation: Ensure the entire document is within the frame when capturing the image.

missing_sections.description: No missing sections are detected on the document.

obstructions.description: No obstructions are detected on the document.

classification.reasoning: The document contains all necessary fields to be classified as an expense document. It includes details such as the supplier, consumer, transaction amount, transaction date, invoice/receipt number, tax information, item description/line items, and payment method details.

schema_field_analysis.expense_identification_reasoning: All required fields for expense identification are present in the document.

extraction.supplier_address: Level 21, Menara Maxis, Kuala Lumpur City Centre, Off Jalan Ampang, 50088 Kuala Lumpur
extraction.customer_address: 206 JALAN DESA MESRA, TAMAN DESA, 58100 KUALA LUMPUR, WP KUALA LUMPUR, MALAYSIA
extraction.special_notes: Your service may be temporarily interrupted if full payment is not received by the due date. Reconnection fee and late payment charges may apply.
extraction.terms_conditions: For refund of deposit or balance in your terminated account or service, please submit your request at www.maxis.com.my/refund

issues.description: Transaction time is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Date of the expense must be visible on receipt

issues.description: Payment method is missing on the receipt.
issues.recommendation: It is recommended to address this issue with the supplier or provider.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Date of the expense must be visible on receipt

issues.description: Tax amount is present, but the expense will be grossed up as per local regulations.
issues.recommendation: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free. Expenses that fall under taxable income will be treated as per the local regulations.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: All approved expenses will be paid as NET to the employee and grossed up if they are not tax-free. Expenses that fall under taxable income will be treated as per the local regulations

issues.description: Additional information is required to establish the clear business purpose of the expense and to convert the amount in local currency.
issues.recommendation: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses. Submit expense claims with clear and legible copies of the receipts to Client line manager for approval preferably within the same month of the expense.
issues.knowledge_base_reference: Convert amount in local currency and include currency & exchange rate used for foreign currency expenses. Submit expense claims with clear and legible copies of the receipts to Client line manager for approval preferably within the same month of the expense

validation_result.compliance_summary: The receipt is missing the transaction time and payment method, which are mandatory fields. Additionally, the tax amount indicates that the expense will be grossed up as per local regulations. Further, additional information is required to establish the clear business purpose of the expense and to convert the amount in local currency.
